ValidationRule.description: LST - An Asset is required on this Case
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE) && ISPICKVAL(Type, "Tech Support") && TEXT( Origin ) <> "Web" && OR(ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Adapter Support") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Application") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Chips & Reagent") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Computer") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Consumable") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Hardware") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Installation") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Integration") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c , "Software")) && ISBLANK(AssetId)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_026: An Asset is required on this Case - See "Assets" tab on layout
